name: Pesto Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Rotelli pasta, cooked OR other shaped pasta
1/2 cup Yellow or green pepper, halved (or both)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and wash the spinach. Place in a saucepan with some water covering the leaves. Cover and cook over medium heat until wilted, about 2-3 minutes. Drain off water. Set aside.
2. Add the next 7 ingredients to a blender jar. Add the chopped spinach and process until smooth.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to a large bowl. Pour in the blended dressing and toss to mix.
